item.title: Mike_kim714: Michael S. Kim @Mike_kim714 · 4min Should have signed up for Zurich with Jason as my partner Cita PGA TOUR Communicatio
item.description:
Michael S. Kim @Mike_kim714 · 4min Should have signed up for Zurich with Jason as my partner Cita PGA TOUR Communications @PGATOURComms · 1h The 7:40 a.m. pairing of Michael Kim (62) and Jason Day (64) combined for a total of 17 birdies in the final round of the RBC Heritage.
Kim’s 62 included a career best 20 putts and equaled his career low 18-hole score. x.com/pgatour/status… 9 1 93 3 mil

item.title: PGATOUR: PGA TOUR @PGATOUR · 37min Watch Chasing Sunday today at 2 p.m. on CBS. Cita PGA TOUR @PGATOUR · 18 mar. "Are you guys be
item.description:
PGA TOUR @PGATOUR · 37min Watch Chasing Sunday today at 2 p.m. on CBS. Cita PGA TOUR @PGATOUR · 18 mar. "Are you guys besties?"
"We're not friends."
NEVER a dull moment between Scottie Scheffler and Si Woo Kim. 6 3 44 40 mil
